overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing the protagonist Geralt exploring a medieval European town with timber-framed architecture. The character walks through a central square with a decorative gazebo, crosses a wooden bridge over a canal with views of distant sailing ships, and traverses an elevated stone walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: town square with central gazebo and well

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the town square toward the central wooden gazebo

notable_agents.action: woman in red dress standing on the gazebo steps
woman in green dress walking along the right side

entered.detail: octagonal wooden structure with decorative gold patterns and red roof
circular stone well with wooden roof structure
traditional half-timbered building with white plaster and dark wooden beams
medieval stone tower with conical red roof visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a sunlit medieval town square with stone paving. A decorative wooden gazebo with gold detailing stands in the center, surrounded by NPCs in period clothing. The camera follows Geralt as he walks toward the gazebo, passing a stone well on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden footbridge over canal with waterfront buildings

events.description: steps from stone pavement onto wooden bridge over the canal
character stops at the far end of the bridge to look at the canal and distant ships, then turns around to return

agents.ego_description: crossing the wooden bridge over the canal, pausing to observe the water and distant sailing ships before turning back

notable_agents.action: man in blue tunic and hat walking across the bridge in the opposite direction

entered.detail: wooden footbridge with railings spanning the canal
blue-green water flowing beneath the bridge
tall masts of sailing ships visible in the harbor distance
cluster of timber-framed buildings built along the canal edge

segments.scene_description: The character transitions onto a wooden bridge spanning a canal, with the ground changing from stone to wooden planks. The view opens to reveal waterfront houses along the canal and distant sailing ships. After reaching the far side, the character pauses to observe the scenery before turning to return.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated stone walkway overlooking the town

events.description: steps back onto stone pavement while returning from the bridge
ascends stone steps to reach an elevated walkway with crenellated walls

agents.ego_description: walking back through the square and continuing along an elevated stone pathway away from the canal

entered.detail: the octagonal gazebo comes back into view when returning to the square
the circular well visible again upon returning
raised stone platform with crenellated stone walls overlooking the town
medieval stone fortifications and towers visible in the background

segments.scene_description: The character returns across the bridge to the stone-paved square, passing the gazebo and well once more. Continuing past the square, the character ascends stone steps to an elevated walkway with crenellated walls, offering elevated views of the medieval town and distant castle towers.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit medieval town, transitioning from a bustling central square to a waterfront vista and finally to an elevated vantage point. It begins on stone paving in a town square, following Geralt as he passes a stone well toward a decorative wooden gazebo with gold detailing. As the character moves forward, the terrain shifts from stone to wooden planks upon crossing a bridge over a canal, opening the view to waterfront houses and distant sailing ships. The scene then reverses course back across the bridge and through the square before turning toward a set of stone steps. Finally, the camera ascends to an elevated walkway with crenellated walls, revealing a sweeping perspective of the town and distant castle towers.
